sources.title: Silver on the Sage
sources.description: Title: Silver on the Sage Summary: Hoppy goes undercover as a gambler from the East when Bar 20 cattle are stolen by unknown rustlers. Brennan/Talbot are twin brothers (one a casino owner, the other a rancher) and Hoppy ... Directed by: Lesley Selander Actors: William Boyd, Russell Hayden, George Production Company: Harry Sherman Productions Release Date: 31 March 1939 (USA) Aspect Ratio: 1.37 : 1 Color: Black and White Hoppy goes undercover as a gambler from the East when Bar 20 cattle are stolen by unknown rustlers. Brennan/Talbot are twin brothers (one a casino owner, the other a rancher) and Hoppy believes they provide alibis for each other while one is out committing crimes. Hoppy gets a job in the casino to learn more but is exposed when a gambling gunslinger notices him.

sources.title: Silver on the Sage 1939 colorized (Hopalong Cassidy, Russell Hayden)
sources.description: Bar 20 cattle are being stolen by unknown rustlers. Casino owner Earl Brennan & rancher Dave Talbot (Stanley Ridges) are twin brothers who each provide an alibi while the other is out committing a crime. Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) goes undercover as a gambler from the East, getting a job in the casino to learn more, but is exposed when a gambling gunslinger notices him. With Russell Hayden and Gabby Hayes. I colorized this using AI software that doesn't always get the colors right, but I think it looks fairly natural. Hopefully a more professional job will be done someday.

sources.title: SILVER ON THE SAGE video quality upgrade
sources.description: This print is less than perfect, but it has improved contrast and brightness. “Well done and interesting” “Entertaining” “More fun and adventure with Hoppy and company” (IMDB reviews quotes). Hoppy goes undercover to catch twin crooks and their gang of cattle rustlers, which gves more screen time to Gabby and Russell. Good cast and good production values. All of which place it a lariat above the average matinee oater. Followed in 1941 by “In Old Colorado.” IMDB rating 7.0. Directed by Lesley Selander. Released in 1939. Complete print (original release) TRIVIA: The 23 rd  of 66 Hopalong Cassidy westerns.

metadata.Plot: Hoppy goes undercover as a gambler from the East when Bar 20 cattle are stolen by unknown rustlers. Brennan/Talbot are twin brothers (one a casino owner, the other a rancher) and Hoppy believes they provide alibis for each other while one is out committing crimes. Hoppy gets a job in the casino to learn more but is exposed when a gambling gunslinger notices him.
metadata.Actors: William Boyd, Russell Hayden, George 'Gabby' Hayes
